articles.title: This weekend’s two biggest movies were both directed by YouTubers - TechCrunch
articles.description: The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong.
articles.content:
The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong this weekend.
